subject: English
chapter: A Slumber Did My Spirit Seal
title: A Slumber Did My Spirit Seal – Medium Short Notes

key_points: The poem 'A Slumber Did My Spirit Seal' is written by William Wordsworth
It belongs to the Romantic literary movement that emphasizes nature and emotions
The poet initially believes that the girl he loved is beyond the effect of time
In the second stanza he realizes that she has died
The poem suggests that after death humans become part of the natural world
characters: The Poet – A person reflecting on love, loss and the reality of death
The Girl – The loved person whose death the poet realizes
themes: Acceptance of death as part of life
Connection between human life and nature
literary_devices: Imagery – 'Rocks, stones and trees' create a picture of nature
exam_tips: Explain the emotional shift between the two stanzas
Mention the connection between death and nature
Highlight the Romantic elements in the poem
